name: @flying-pillow/open-mission-core
description: Open Mission core workflow orchestrator and mission entity logic

scripts.build: pnpm run generate:surql && rm -rf build tsconfig.tsbuildinfo && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ./build/workflow/engine/copyTemplateFiles.js && mkdir -p build/lib/database && cp src/lib/database/*.surql build/lib/database/
scripts.dev: pnpm run generate:surql && OPEN_MISSION_DAEMON_RUNTIME_MODE=source tsx --watch --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json ./src/daemon/open-missiond.ts run --dev
